public int Add(int a, int b) => a + b;
public List<int> Range(int n) => Enumerable.Range(0, n).ToList();
public int Max(int a, int b) => a > b ? a : b;
public bool Contains<T>(IEnumerable<T> src, T item) => src.Any(x => x!.Equals(item));
public string Reverse(string s) => new string(s.Reverse().ToArray());
public int Factorial(int n) => n <= 1 ? 1 : n * Factorial(n - 1);
public IEnumerable<T> Flatten<T>(IEnumerable<IEnumerable<T>> src) => src.SelectMany(x => x);
public Dictionary<K,V> ToDictionary<K,V>(IEnumerable<(K,V)> pairs) => pairs.ToDictionary(p => p.Item1, p => p.Item2);
public int Clamp(int v, int min, int max) => Math.Clamp(v, min, max);
